log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Triton — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 8 falling damage. HP: 170/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 16] FAIL — still paralyzed.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Triton — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Triton — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Triton — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 15] HIT! 16 damage. Triton — Unarmored Caster HP: 51/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Triton — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 15] HIT! 16 damage. Triton — Unarmored Caster HP: 35/67
→ Triton — Unarmored Caster loses concentration on Hold Person! [CON save 5 vs DC 10]
Young Red Dragon attacks Triton — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 15] MISS.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Triton — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Triton — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 15] HIT! 13 damage. Triton — Unarmored Caster HP: 22/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Triton — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 15] MISS.
Young Red Dragon attacks Triton — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 15] CRITICAL HIT! 27 damage. Triton — Unarmored Caster HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
